abort_conditions: Abort if any target redirects outside the PP&D public allowlist.
Abort if robots or crawl policy evidence is missing or no longer allowed.
Abort if a response would require authentication or raw body persistence.
post_run_review_prompts: Review metadata-only manifests for source ids, checksums, and citation references.
Confirm no raw body, downloaded document, browser trace, or private path was persisted.
Require a separate human approval before any later live recrawl proposal.
